title: Rethinking My Mornings
sentences: For years, I had followed the same rigid morning routine without question.
Recently, however, I have started to reconsider whether it truly suits me.
While some people thrive on strict schedules, I find them oddly draining.
Having tried different approaches, I now wake up whenever I feel rested.
Critics might argue that flexibility leads to laziness, but I disagree entirely.
My productivity has actually improved since I abandoned my old habits.
Instead of rushing through breakfast, I now take time to enjoy it.
This small change has made mornings feel far less stressful.
Admittedly, my new routine would not suit everyone's lifestyle.
Nevertheless, it has taught me to question habits I once took for granted.
